title: Minebox Gray Crops
description: Makes immature crops gray for easy field management. Includes Respackopts customization for selective crop appearance control.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3NQofyGp/images/9602b784bfb0b0d765f41a6e46d2caf4f9362a98.png)

This is an add-on for **[Minebox Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minebox-plus)** that visually improves crop recognition during farming. It changes the appearance of **immature (not fully grown) crops** to a **gray tint**, allowing players to easily identify which parts of their field have not yet matured. This small but practical tweak helps you harvest efficiently without constantly checking each plant’s growth stage.
Want to customize the look of **specific crops only**? You can do that easily using the [Respackopts Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)! With it installed, you’ll gain access to **detailed configuration options**, enabling you to adjust or disable the gray tint for individual crops — giving you full control over how the add-on behaves.
> ### 🌐 **Language Support** > All configuration options and in-game settings are available in **English (EN)**, **Polish (PL)**, and **French (FR)**. > Language is automatically detected based on your Minecraft language settings.
> ### **Note:** > If you’re already using **Minebox Plus** together with the **Respackopts Mod**, you **don’t need to install this add-on separately**. > Starting from **Minebox Plus v3.0.0**, this feature is **built directly into the main resource pack**, available under the **Crops Settings** tab within the pack’s options.
--- > ### 🌐 Minebox Server [(Server Page)](https://minebox.co/) > **Minebox** combines **MMORPG**, **Skyblock** gameplay into a unique experience. Explore uncharted islands, gather rare materials, and battle powerful creatures — all while discovering a world full of secrets and adventure.

> ### 🌍 **Minebox Community** > Want to explore more **community-driven projects**, **add-ons**, and **useful systems** for Minebox? > Visit [**mineboxcommunity.com**](https://mineboxcommunity.com) — a central hub for everything related to Minebox. > There you’ll find a growing collection of resources, guides, and packs created by both developers and players, all aimed at enhancing and expanding the Minebox experience.
